== Notes for [[Item:Q98320|Q98320]] ==

Shechaniah ,

son of David and nn to: nn

1) Hizkiah to: nn

--------------------
source: http://www.geni.com/people/Shechanya-ibn-Da-ud/6000000014925917937?through=6000000000802429286

Shechaniah ,

son of David and nn to: nn

1) Hizkiah to: nn

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
6702EFBB957B01EFBBF89829A6488A4D4CA3
geni:6000000014925917937

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
